commands.review_summary:
The PR caps embedded-agent compaction reserve and keep-recent token budgets when a model context window is known, and updates config help/docs for those caps.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +33, Docs +2. Total +50 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main caps only the floor, so a 16K context can keep reserveTokens at 16,384 and keepRecentTokens at 20,000, leaving no usable prompt budget. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR has a protected maintainer label and a deliberate compatibility-sensitive settings behavior change, so the remaining action is maintainer review rather than automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): cap compaction budgets for small contexts
target.body:
## Summary

- cap embedded-agent compaction reserve when the known model context window would otherwise leave no usable prompt budget
- cap keep-recent tokens to the prompt budget remaining after reserve for small and mid-sized contexts
- update config help/types and gateway config docs to document context-window caps

## Verification

Behavior addressed: small-context runs no longer retain impossible compaction `reserveTokens` or `keepRecentTokens` budgets when `contextTokenBudget` is known.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest/docs/format proof in a Codex worktree, branch autoreview, AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate, and GitHub PR checks for the pushed head.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts --reporter=dot
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts
node scripts/docs-list.js
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/gateway/config-agents.md
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/gateway/config-agents.md
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `470b4776011`; focused local wrapper passed `src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts` with 36/36 tests after the final rebase; oxfmt, docs inventory, docs formatting, docs MDX, and diff checks passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.84)`. AWS Crabbox `check:changed` passed during refresh with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_b24226fe081c`, slug `amber-crab`, run `run_43cb1d5fa163`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0, and lease cleanup stopped; the changed gate selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`.

Observed result after fix: a 16K-context profile resolves reserve to `8,384` and keep-recent to `8,000`; configured over-budget reserve and keep-recent values are capped to the available context window; when no context window is known, existing uncapped behavior is preserved.

What was not tested: no live Ollama generation for this patch; the changed behavior is the embedded-agent settings normalization layer and is covered by focused settings tests, branch review, current PR CI, and remote changed-gate proof.
target.author: vincentkoc
